title: School property exempt from seizure
doc_html:
PART II.  EXEMPTIONS

§31.  School property exempt from seizure

Property dedicated to the use of and belonging to public schools or employed by municipal corporations for that purpose, is exempt from seizure.
doc_text:
PART II.  EXEMPTIONS
§31.  School property exempt from seizure
Property dedicated to the use of and belonging to public schools or employed by municipal corporations for that purpose, is exempt from seizure.
